title: Nearer To Thee
content:
"Nearer, my God, to thee,
        E'en though a cross it be
        That raiseth me,
        Still all my song shall be,
        Nearer, my God, to thee.
        Nearer to thee!"
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nearer To Thee"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
